product_finish_contract.visual_finish_target: record the project-specific visual finish bar here, or state that no consumer-facing visual bar applies
product_finish_contract.audio_finish_target: record the project-specific audio finish bar here, or state that no audio bar applies
product_finish_contract.content_source_plan: record whether content is authored, licensed, procedural, mixed, or intentionally absent
product_finish_contract.licensing_or_provenance_constraints: record any asset or content provenance constraints here
product_finish_contract.finish_acceptance_signals: record the explicit finish-proof signals that must be met before the repo is treated as finished
